element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Available from start; foundation for all combat
Player learns to manage AI companion behavior alongside melee attacks
Meter fills when not attacking; empty = melee only; red = weak ranged magic; full = strong ranged magic
Performed when magic meter is red but not full; scales with ally class
Performed when magic meter is full; requires resource management

element_introduction_order.element: Multiple ally classes (Amazon, Big Man, Knight, Lizardman, Ninja, Priest, Thief, Wizard)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each class has distinct abilities; magical allies respond to magic meter; non-magical allies always attack
Items assist player or current ally; strategic selection required
Instant full-screen attack when collected; emergency panic button

element_introduction_order.element: Health management (5 HP bar sets with overflow counter)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary resource; ally has separate 4-bar max HP
8 boss floors total; final boss Drokmar on floor 50
Require specific maneuvers to unlock; optional skill-based progression

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting magical book for full-screen attack
Accessing secret door bypass (optional tension release)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Tower-climb structure with escalating difficulty; rhythmic melee-cast cycle creates wave-like tension as magic meter oscillates; boss encounters punctuate rhythm at approximate 6-floor intervals

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret Doors hidden in stages; require specific player-performed maneuvers to reveal
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Execution-based discovery (specific player actions unlock secret passages); rewards skilled play

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational mechanics introduction; basic enemy patterns; player learns sword-magic meter synergy and ally management
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Ally variety increases strategic options; magic meter resource pressure intensifies; first major bosses test mastery of melee-ranged cycle
difficulty_curve.late_game: Enemy density and aggression escalate; boss encounters test both resource management and pattern recognition; final approach to Drokmar
notable_spikes: Floor 8 and subsequent boss encounters (every ~6 floors)
Drokmar final boss on floor 50 (ultimate difficulty spike)
Floors with multiple simultaneous high-HP enemies

notable_level_patterns.description: 51-floor vertical progression through Dragon Keep; each floor presents distinct enemy configurations; 8 distributed boss floors create rhythm checkpoint system
Attack empties meter; meter fills during non-attack periods; state determines attack power (none/weak/strong); creates intrinsic rhythm independent of level design
7 hidden progression bypasses requiring specific maneuvers; skill-gated optional content; allows speedrunning routes and mastery expression
8 boss encounters spaced throughout 51 floors; final boss on floor 50; bosses serve as difficulty and narrative climax points
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Floor 50 (Drokmar); other boss floors at intervals

sources_used: Wikipedia - Magic Sword: Heroic Fantasy (gameplay section, development notes, structure)
